2026 Combinatorics Workshop

October 20-22, 2026

  • Home
  • Schedule
  • History
  • 한국어

History

1st: 2004 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2004년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: August 16-17, 2004
  • Venue: Yonsei University, Seoul
  • Host: Yonsei University BK21 Research Group

2nd: 2005 Combinatorial Mathematics Conference

  • Korean name: 2005 조합수학 학술대회
  • Date: August 8-10, 2005
  • Venue: Yonsei University, Seoul
  • Host: Yonsei University BK21 Research Group
  • (Local) Organizers: Dongsu Kim, Seung Kyung Park, Sang-Gu Lee, Jaeun Lee

3rd: 2006 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2006년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: August 9-10, 2006
  • Venue: Yeongnam University, Gyeongsan
  • Host: Department of Mathematics, Yeongnam University
  • (Local) Organizers: Jaeun Lee, Young Soo Kwon

4th: 2007 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2007년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: August 6-8, 2007
  • Venue: KAIST, Daejeon
  • Host: KAIST Combinatorics Lab
  • (Local) Organizers: Heesung Shin, Jang Soo Kim

5th: 2008 Workshop on Combinatorics

  • Korean name: 2008년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: August 7-8, 2008
  • Venue: Sungkyunkwan University, Suwon
  • Host: Sungkyunkwan University BK21 Division
  • (Local) Organizers: Gi-Sang Cheon, Sang-Gu Lee

6th: 2009 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2009년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: August 20-21, 2009
  • Venue: KAIST, Daejeon
  • Host: KAIST ASARC
  • (Local) Organizers: Soon-Yi Kang, Sang-il Oum

7th: 2010 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2010년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: August 20-21, 2010
  • Venue: Yeongnam University, Gyeongsan
  • Host: Department of Mathematics, Yeongnam University
  • (Local) Organizers: Jaeun Lee, Young Soo Kwon

8th: 2011 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2011년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: August 17-19, 2011
  • Venue: Kangwon National University, Chuncheon
  • Host: Department of Mathematics Education, Kangwon National University
  • (Local) Organizers: Seunghyun Seo, Heesung Shin

9th: 2012 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2012년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: August 9-10, 2012
  • Venue: Chonnam National University, Gwangju
  • Host: Department of Mathematics, Chonnam National University
  • (Local) Organizers: Hyeong-Kwan Ju, Sangwook Kim

10th: 2013 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2013년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: August 7-9, 2013
  • Venue: CAMP (Center for Applications of Mathematical Principles), NIMS, Daejeon
  • Host: NIMS (National Institute for Mathematical Sciences)
  • (Local) Organizers: Dongsu Kim, Boram Park, Seunghyun Seo, Heesung Shin, Ae Ja Yee

11th: 2014 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2014년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: October 31-November 1, 2014
  • Venue: Ajou University, Suwon
  • Host: Department of Mathematics, Ajou University
  • (Local) Organizers: Soojin Cho, Suyoung Choi, Boram Park

12th: 2015 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2015년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: July 13-16, 2015
  • Venue: CAMP (Center for Applications of Mathematical Principles), NIMS, Daejeon
  • Host: NIMS (National Institute for Mathematical Sciences)
  • (Local) Organizers: JiYoon Jung, Seunghyun Seo, Heesung Shin, Jiang Zeng

13th: 2016 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2016년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: July 21-23, 2016
  • Venue: KAIST, Daejeon
  • Host: KIAS CMC
  • (Local) Organizers: Soojin Cho, Dongsu Kim, Young Soo Kwon, Sang-il Oum

14th: 2017 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2017년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: August 16-17, 2017
  • Venue: Sungkyunkwan University, Suwon
  • Host: Applied Algebra and Optimization Research Center (AORC), Sungkyunkwan University
  • (Local) Organizers: Gi-Sang Cheon, Jang Soo Kim, Young Soo Kwon, Heesung Shin

15th: 2018 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2018년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: August 17-18, 2018
  • Venue: Seoul National University, Seoul
  • Host: IMDARC, Seoul National University
  • (Local) Organizers: Woong Kook, Seung Jin Lee

16th: 2019 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2019년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: August 13-15, 2019
  • Venue: Hotel Skypark Songdo, Incheon
  • Host: Combinatorics Incheon and IBS Discrete Mathematics Group
  • (Local) Organizers: O-joung Kwon, Suil O, Sang-il Oum, Heesung Shin

17th: 2020 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2020년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: August 24, 2020
  • Venue: Kyung Hee University, Seoul (online)
  • Host: Kyung Hee University and IBS Discrete Mathematics Group
  • (Local) Organizers: Jeong Han Kim, Sang June Lee, Sang-il Oum, Heesung Shin

18th: 2021 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2021년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: December 20-22, 2021
  • Venue: The Bloomvista, Yangpyeong
  • Host: IBS Discrete Mathematics Group
  • (Local) Organizers: Jeong-Ok Choi, Sang-il Oum, Heesung Shin

19th: 2022 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2022년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: September 30-October 1, 2022
  • Venue: GIST, Gwangju
  • Host: GIST and IBS Extremal Combinatorics and Probability Group
  • (Local) Organizers: Jeong Ok Choi, Minki Kim, Sangwook Kim, Hong Liu

20th: 2023 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2023년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: August 16-18, 2023
  • Venue: Yonsei University, Seoul
  • Host: Yonsei University
  • (Local) Organizers: JiSun Huh, Sangwook Kim, Joonkyung Lee, Jaebum Sohn

21st: 2024 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2024년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: August 28-30, 2024
  • Venue: Chungbuk National University, Cheongju
  • Host: Chungbuk National University and IBS Discrete Mathematics Group
  • (Local) Organizers: Doowon Koh, Eunjeong Lee, Sang-il Oum, Meesue Yoo

22nd: 2025 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2025년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: August 18-20, 2025
  • Venue: Institute for Basic Science, Daejeon
  • Host: IBS Discrete Mathematics Group
  • (Local) Organizers: Jang Soo Kim, Sang-il Oum, Seunghyun Seo

23rd: 2026 Combinatorics Workshop

  • Korean name: 2026년 조합론 학술대회
  • Date: October 20-22, 2026
  • Venue: Konjiam Resort, Yongin
  • Host: IBS Discrete Mathematics Group, Seoul National University, Hankuk University of Foreign Studies
  • (Local) Organizers: Ilkyoo Choi, Sang-il Oum, Boram Park
